zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Spencer於1384年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford22歲，母親Dorothy de Abbetot14歲。他和Lady Margaret Smythe至少有4個兒子。他去世於大約1433年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Spencer于1384年出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford22岁，母亲Dorothy de Abbetot14岁。他和Lady Margaret Smythe至少有4个儿子。他去世于大约1433年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Spencer was born in 1384, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford, was 22 and his mother, Dorothy de Abbetot, was 14. He had at least 4 sons with Lady Margaret Smythe. He died about 1433, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Spencer est né en 1384, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Dorothy de Abbetot, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Lady Margaret Smythe. Il est décédé environ 1433, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Spencer 1384 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford 22 und seine Mutter Dorothy de Abbetot 14. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Smythe mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1433 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Spencer è nato il nel 1384 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy de Abbetot, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Lady Margaret Smythe. Morì circa 1433, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Spencerが1384年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Spencer of Deffordは22歳，母Dorothy de Abbetotは14歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Smytheとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1433年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Spencer(이)가 1384년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy de Abbetot(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Smythe(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1433년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Spencer nasceu em 1384, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy de Abbetot, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Lady Margaret Smythe. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1433, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Spencer родился в 1384 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy de Abbetot, 14. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Lady Margaret Smythe. Он умер около 1433 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Spencer nació en 1384, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Spencer of Defford, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Dorothy de Abbetot, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Lady Margaret Smythe. Murió aproximadamente 1433, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
